goal: Continue DEV-018 in the existing DEV-018 worktree after the first writer produced no diff. Complete production launch readiness documentation and safe templates without product feature changes.

acceptance: Continuation is executed through the codex_executor connector in the existing DEV-018 isolated worktree, not by manual chat edits.

Record the first DEV-018 writer no-diff stall as a Loop executor failure observation, not a product failure.

Add or update a production readiness checklist covering configuration, GitHub Secrets, database migration, backup, restore, logging, health checks, smoke tests, dependency/security audit, rollback, operations handoff, and release sign-off.

Backup and restore procedure must be concrete for PostgreSQL-compatible deployment and use placeholders only.
Production smoke instructions must require caller-provided base URL and credentials outside the repo, with no hardcoded production host.
Update stale project status docs if they still say DEV-016/DEV-017 are incomplete after #43.
Do not change business behavior, permissions, AI boundaries, or UI menus.
Run git diff --check at minimum and document intended full gates.
